canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>grove</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
html, body { width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; background: #0a0a0f; }
canvas { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('c');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H;
let trees = [];
let wind = { x: 0, y: 0, target: 0 };
let time = 0;
let audioCtx, windNode, windGain;

function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// L-system rules for tree
const rules = {
  'F': 'FF',
  'X': 'F-[[X]+X]+F[+FX]-X'
};

function generateLSystem(axiom, iterations) {
  let result = axiom;
  for (let i = 0; i < iterations; i++) {
    let next = '';
    for (const char of result) {
      next += rules[char] || char;
    }
    result = next;
  }
  return result;
}

class Tree {
  constructor(x, y) {
    this.x = x;
    this.y = y;
    this.age = 0;
    this.maxAge = 300 + Math.random() * 200;
    this.grown = false;
    this.iterations = 4 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2);
    this.lsystem = generateLSystem('X', this.iterations);
    this.angle = 22 + Math.random() * 8;
    this.segments = [];
    this.buildSegments();
    this.hue = 280 + Math.random() * 60; // purple to pink range
  }

  buildSegments() {
    const stack = [];
    let x = this.x;
    let y = this.y;
    let dir = -90; // pointing up
    const len = 3 + Math.random() * 2;
    let depth = 0;

    for (const char of this.lsystem) {
      if (char === 'F') {
        const rad = dir * Math.PI / 180;
        const nx = x + Math.cos(rad) * len;
        const ny = y + Math.sin(rad) * len;
        this.segments.push({
          x1: x, y1: y, x2: nx, y2: ny,
          depth: depth,
          swayOffset: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
          swayAmp: 0.5 + depth * 0.3
        });
        x = nx;
        y = ny;
      } else if (char === '+') {
        dir += this.angle;
        depth++;
      } else if (char === '-') {
        dir -= this.angle;
        depth++;
      } else if (char === '[') {
        stack.push({ x, y, dir, depth });
      } else if (char === ']') {
        const state = stack.pop();
        x = state.x;
        y = state.y;
        dir = state.dir;
        depth = state.depth;
      }
    }
  }

  draw() {
    const growthRatio = Math.min(1, this.age / this.maxAge);
    const visibleSegments = Math.floor(this.segments.length * growthRatio);

    for (let i = 0; i < visibleSegments; i++) {
      const seg = this.segments[i];
      const segGrowth = Math.min(1, (growthRatio * this.segments.length - i));
      if (segGrowth <= 0) continue;

      // Wind sway
      const sway = Math.sin(time * 0.002 + seg.swayOffset) * seg.swayAmp * wind.x * 0.5;
      const swayY = Math.cos(time * 0.003 + seg.swayOffset) * seg.swayAmp * 0.2;

      const x1 = seg.x1 + sway * (seg.depth * 0.1);
      const y1 = seg.y1 + swayY * (seg.depth * 0.1);
      const x2 = seg.x1 + (seg.x2 - seg.x1) * segGrowth + sway * (seg.depth * 0.15);
      const y2 = seg.y1 + (seg.y2 - seg.y1) * segGrowth + swayY * (seg.depth * 0.15);

      // Thickness decreases with depth
      const thickness = Math.max(0.5, 4 - seg.depth * 0.4);
      
      // Color shifts from cyan (trunk) to pink (tips)
      const depthRatio = seg.depth / 8;
      const hue = 180 + depthRatio * 140; // cyan to magenta
      const lightness = 50 + depthRatio * 20;
      const alpha = 0.6 + (1 - depthRatio) * 0.4;

      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
      ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
      ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${hue}, 80%, ${lightness}%, ${alpha})`;
      ctx.lineWidth = thickness;
      ctx.lineCap = 'round';
      ctx.stroke();

      // Glow on tips
      if (seg.depth > 5 && segGrowth > 0.8) {
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(x2, y2, 2 + Math.sin(time * 0.01 + seg.swayOffset) * 1, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(320, 100%, 70%, ${0.3 + Math.sin(time * 0.005) * 0.2})`;
        ctx.fill();
      }
    }

    this.age++;
    if (this.age >= this.maxAge) this.grown = true;
  }
}

function initAudio() {
  audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  
  // Wind noise
  const bufferSize = audioCtx.sampleRate * 2;
  const buffer = audioCtx.createBuffer(1, bufferSize, audioCtx.sampleRate);
  const data = buffer.getChannelData(0);
  for (let i = 0; i < bufferSize; i++) {
    data[i] = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
  }
  
  windNode = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
  windNode.buffer = buffer;
  windNode.loop = true;
  
  const filter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
  filter.type = 'lowpass';
  filter.frequency.value = 200;
  filter.Q.value = 1;
  
  windGain = audioCtx.createGain();
  windGain.gain.value = 0;
  
  windNode.connect(filter);
  filter.connect(windGain);
  windGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  windNode.start();
}

// Mouse interaction
let mouseX = W / 2;
canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  wind.target = (mouseX - W / 2) / (W / 2) * 3;
});

canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  if (!audioCtx) initAudio();
  
  // Plant a new tree
  if (trees.length < 15) {
    trees.push(new Tree(e.clientX, H - 20 - Math.random() * 30));
    
    // Growth sound
    const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
    osc.type = 'sine';
    osc.frequency.value = 200 + Math.random() * 100;
    gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.1, audioCtx.currentTime);
    gain.gain.exponentialDecayTo && gain.gain.exponentialDecayTo(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.5);
    gain.gain.setTargetAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime, 0.15);
    osc.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
    osc.start();
    osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.5);
  }
});

// Start with a few trees
for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  trees.push(new Tree(
    W * 0.2 + Math.random() * W * 0.6,
    H - 20 - Math.random() * 30
  ));
}

function drawGround() {
  const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, H - 50, 0, H);
  gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(20, 10, 30, 0)');
  gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(20, 10, 30, 1)');
  ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
  ctx.fillRect(0, H - 50, W, 50);
}

function drawStars() {
  for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
    const x = (i * 137.5) % W;
    const y = (i * 73.7) % (H * 0.6);
    const twinkle = 0.3 + Math.sin(time * 0.003 + i) * 0.3;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(x, y, 0.5 + Math.random() * 0.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(200, 220, 255, ${twinkle})`;
    ctx.fill();
  }
}

function animate() {
  time++;
  
  // Smooth wind
  wind.x += (wind.target - wind.x) * 0.02;
  
  // Update wind audio
  if (windGain) {
    windGain.gain.setTargetAtTime(Math.abs(wind.x) * 0.03, audioCtx.currentTime, 0.1);
  }
  
  // Clear with slight trail
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.15)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  drawStars();
  drawGround();
  
  // Draw all trees
  for (const tree of trees) {
    tree.draw();
  }
  
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

animate();
</script>
</body>
</html>
